claim: Induction of urokinase receptor signaling in podocytes causes foot process effacement and proteinuria.
evidence_sentences: Here we show that induction of urokinase receptor (uPAR) signaling in podocytes leads to foot process effacement and urinary protein loss via a mechanism that includes lipid-dependent activation of αvβ3 integrin.

conditions: induction of uPAR signaling in podocytes
